PDFが重くなる原因のほとんどは、ファイル内に埋め込まれた高解像度画像や、フォン: Oversized PDFs are usually caused by high-resolution embedded images or embedded font data. This guide walks you through the concrete steps to safely compress a PDF using your Mac or Windows built-in tools, or free web services — no paid software needed.

どの端末で開いても同じフォントで表示させるため、PDF内にフォントデータを丸ごと: To ensure text displays correctly on any device, PDFs often embed the full font data. This increases the file size even for text-heavy documents.
